headline: Short Sales Are Making a Comeback
summary: A new report from Realtor.com® finds that short sales, an alternative to foreclosure for underwater homeowners, are growing. Short sales remain a small slice of the market: fewer than 30,000 took place in the U.S. in 2025, accounting for roughly 0.6% of all typical home sales and 28% of distressed sales. Short-sale transactions rose 4% from 2023 to 2024, nearly 10% from 2024 to 2025, and about 16% year over year in the first quarter of 2026, accelerating across these three years. Even so, short
